title: Sales Operations Analyst
description: Charles Schwab is seeking a Sales Operations Analyst to support our growing Boston sales team. You'll be the backbone of our revenue operations, ensuring our sales force has the tools, data, and processes they need to excel in serving our clients. We're looking for someone analytical, detail-oriented, and passionate about enabling sales success through operational excellence.
responsibilities: Maintain and analyze Salesforce data integrity, identifying trends and anomalies affecting sales team performance
Create and maintain sales dashboards and reporting frameworks that track pipeline, conversion rates, and forecast accuracy
Collaborate with sales leadership to design compensation models and territory structures that drive optimal results
Support the implementation of new sales tools and processes, providing training and ongoing support to end users
Generate weekly and monthly sales reports, conducting variance analysis and recommending process improvements

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Finance, or related field preferred
skills: Excel and SQL for data analysis

benefits: Competitive health, dental, and vision coverage
Flexible work arrangement with 3 days onsite, 2 days remote
